title: Do the EB1(a), EB1(b), and EB1(c) categories always share the same cutoff date in the monthly visa bulletin? - Murthy Law Firm | U.S Immigration Law
content:
## Do the EB1(a), EB1(b), and EB1(c) categories always share the same cutoff date in the monthly visa bulletin?
Yes, all EB1 classifications are subject to the same cutoff dates in the visa bulletin. (30.Sep.2025)
